title: EBTA robustness plan (G5 preregistration form)
description: Formulaire G5 : plan de tests de robustesse preregistres avant ouverture OOS_k. Source: SOP 05; DN-030; PAQUET D'EXECUTION section 1.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 1 (G5 form) and section 2 (G5 checklist); SOP 05 sections 5, 17, 19, 21, 23; DN-030

declared_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; must be before OOS_k opening (DN-030).

scenarios.description: Catalogue of preregistered stress-test scenarios. All three classifications (CENTRAL, PLAUSIBLE_BASE, EXTREME) should be present.

stress_id.description: Unique identifier for this scenario; referenced in the robustness result.

classification.description: CENTRAL = base-case assumption; PLAUSIBLE_BASE = realistic deviation; EXTREME = tail stress.

description.description: Human-readable description of the stress scenario.

blocking.description: True if a non-PASS verdict for this scenario blocks OOS opening (DN-030).

pass_condition.description: Preregistered quantitative or qualitative condition for PASS verdict.

conditional_execution.description: Optional: condition under which this scenario is applicable. Null means always execute.

override_rule.description: Preregistered rule governing what happens when a blocking scenario fails (e.g., escalation procedure).

common_stress_baseline_executed.description: True if the mandatory common robustness baseline from SOP 05 has been included.
